final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-concept
Asset type: concept visualization, hero shot
Primary request: futuristic floating building with streamlined white architecture, surrounded by drones and holographic projections, clean energy facilities
Scene/backdrop: aerial urban environment, sustainable cityscape with green infrastructure
Subject: sleek white streamlined building suspended in mid-air, multiple drones orbiting, holographic displays, solar panels and wind turbines integrated
Style/medium: 3D architectural visualization, futuristic concept art
Composition/framing: wide aerial establishing shot, dramatic perspective showing scale
Lighting/mood: bright daylight with soft atmospheric haze, optimistic and aspirational
Color palette: clean white architecture + sky blue + green energy accents + holographic cyan/purple
Materials/textures: smooth matte white surfaces, reflective glass panels, holographic light emissions
Constraints: maintain floating/suspended appearance, emphasize sustainable technology integration
Avoid: dystopian atmosphere, dark shadows, industrial decay, cluttered composition
